_note: These MCPs are recommended for Aegis but are NOT bundled. Install each independently. See SETUP.md for 'claude mcp add' commands and verification steps.

serena.purpose: Precise code read/edit by symbol via LSP (find declaration, find references, rename cross-file). Third stop in codebase navigation after Graphify and Lumen.
serena.install_hint: claude mcp add serena -- uvx --from serena serena-language-server --context-window-tokens 40000

lumen.purpose: Semantic search over the local codebase via embeddings (find code by meaning, not exact text). Second stop in codebase navigation after Graphify.

graphify.purpose: Knowledge graph of code structure (AST + semantic analysis). First stop for structure/impact questions. Invoked manually via /graphify . inside Claude Code — does not install any automatic hook.
graphify.install_hint: pip install graphifyy && graphify install — then run /graphify . inside Claude Code to analyze a project.
graphify.known_limitation: Caches graph.json at startup. Use --watch mode (graphify ./raw --watch) or install a post-commit hook (graphify hook install) to keep the graph current. Validate graph freshness before trusting structural answers.

drawio-mcp-server.purpose: Generate and edit .drawio diagrams programmatically (C4, sequence, infrastructure diagrams). Used exclusively by the architect agent.
drawio-mcp-server.install_hint: See the drawio-mcp-server documentation for installation steps.
